headline: MARKET WRAP — Jun 2
telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Jun 2, 2026 Built for autonomous systems. Useful for humans. DAILY SYNTHESIS Commodities and semiconductors drove today's risk-on session as markets rotated decisively away from defensive positioning into cyclical exposure. Materials strength alongside chip momentum signals broader industrial recovery narrative taking hold. Tomorrow's focus shifts to whether this cyclical bid can sustain momentum or defensive sectors find footing. Phase: EXPANSION. SECTOR CLOSE Top sectors: COPX +6.3%, SMH +5.6%, URA +5.2%, ITA -3.0%, XBI -6.5%. Sector dispersion: 72 (EXTREME, breadth MIXED), 38% positive 1w.
